steps.title: Identify the list
steps.content: The sentence says the student found sketches of two other Black Americans who served in Congress, then names Harold Washington and Augustus Hawkins. The punctuation must introduce those two specific names.

steps.title: Use the list marker
steps.content: Choice A turns the names into a fragment. Choice B uses a semicolon, but the names are not an independent clause. Choice C leaves the relationship between the category and the names unclear. A colon correctly introduces the list of the two people. The answer is D.
